_publications._publicationTitle: Multidimensional Immunotyping of Human NF1-Associated Peripheral Nerve Sheath Tumors Uncovers Tumor-Associated Macrophages as Key Drivers of Immune Evasion in the Tumor Microenvironment.

_contextSnippet: Within the CD3+ T cell compartment, we found relatively similar proportions of tumor-infiltrating CD8+ and CD4+ T cells. PD-1 expression on intratumoral T cells, indicative of T cell activation, revealed that, on average, 70% and 61.2% of CD8+ and CD4+ T cells
details: Successfully detected CD4+ T helper cells showing relatively similar proportions to CD8+ T cells; 61.2% of CD4+ T cells expressed PD-1; CD4+PD-1+ cells showed Th2-associated markers
